title: Cancellation / void
capability: void a completed sale via a CANCELLATION record referencing the original
persona_ref: PERSONA.md week 3 long tail (a returned cornetto = CANCELLATION); NOTES.md record-type taxonomy

traps.detail: a comment claims fiskaly has a refunds endpoint you POST to
traps.correct: there is no refunds endpoint; a void is a CANCELLATION record (POST /records) referencing the original record.id
